creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
There is error in the sysutils/fusefs-exfat port description, the license f=
 or the exFAT code is GPL2, check here - https://code.google.com/p/exfat/
 
 Regards,
 vermaden
 
 
 
 Od: "Dmitry Marakasov" <amdmi3@amdmi3.ru>
 Do: FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org;=20
 Wys=C5=82ane: 0:04 Pi=C4=85tek 2014-05-09
 Temat: [PATCH] sysutils/automount: disable EXFAT by default
 
 >=20
 > >Submitter-Id:	current-users
 > >Originator:	Dmitry Marakasov
 > >Organization:=09
 > >Confidential:	no
 > >Synopsis:	[PATCH] sysutils/automount: disable EXFAT by default
 > >Severity:	non-critical
 > >Priority:	low
 > >Category:	ports
 > >Class:		change-request
 > >Release:	FreeBSD 10.0-RELEASE amd64
 > >Environment:
 > System: FreeBSD hades.panopticon 10.0-RELEASE FreeBSD 10.0-RELEASE #0 r26=
 0807: Fri Jan 17 13:14:28 MSK
 > >Description:
 > - Use new options features
 > - Disable EXFAT by default: fusefs-exfat has license restrictions which p=
 revents distribution it package and, while EXFAT option is enabled in autom=
 ount, would prevent automount package distribution as well. Disabling it by=
  default would fix this, still allowing users building from ports to enable=
  exfat option (or install fusefs-exfat by hand)
 >=20
 > Port maintainer (vermaden@interia.pl) is cc'd.
 >=20
 > Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 1.02 (mode: change, diff: SVN)
 > >How-To-Repeat:
 > >Fix:
 >=20
 > --- automount-1.4.3.patch begins here ---
 > Index: Makefile
 > =3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=
 =3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=
 =3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D
 > --- Makefile	(revision 353359)
 > +++ Makefile	(working copy)
 > @@ -17,25 +17,14 @@
 >  NO_BUILD=3D	yes
 > =20
 >  OPTIONS_DEFINE=3D		NTFS3G EXT4 EXFAT
 > -OPTIONS_DEFAULT=3D	NTFS3G EXT4 EXFAT
 > +OPTIONS_DEFAULT=3D	NTFS3G EXT4
 >  NTFS3G_DESC=3D		Enable NTFS write support with ntfs-3g over FUSE
 > +NTFS3G_RUN_DEPENDS=3D	fusefs-ntfs>=3D0:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/fusefs-ntfs
 >  EXT4_DESC=3D		Support EXT4 filesystem
 > +EXT4_RUN_DEPENDS=3D	fusefs-ext4fuse>=3D0:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/fusefs-ext=
 4fuse
 >  EXFAT_DESC=3D		Support Microsoft exFAT filesystem
 > +EXFAT_RUN_DEPENDS=3D	fusefs-exfat>=3D0:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/fusefs-exfat
 > =20
 > -.include=20
 > -
 > -.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MNTFS3G}
 > -RUN_DEPENDS+=3D	fusefs-ntfs>=3D0:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/fusefs-ntfs
 > -.endif
 > -
 > -.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MEXT4}
 > -RUN_DEPENDS+=3D	fusefs-ext4fuse>=3D0:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/fusefs-ext4fus=
 e
 > -.endif
 > -
 > -.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MEXFAT}
 > -RUN_DEPENDS+=3D	fusefs-exfat>=3D0:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/fusefs-exfat
 > -.endif
 > -
 >  do-install:
 >  	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/automount             ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/=
 sbin
 >  	${INSTALL_DATA}   ${WRKSRC}/automount_devd.conf   ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/=
 etc/devd/automount_devd.conf
 > --- automount-1.4.3.patch ends here ---
 >=20
 >=20
 
 
 =
